title: simsia fruticulosa
intro: Simsia fruticulosa, also known as the yellow flowered Simsia, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. Simsia fruticulosa has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various ailments, including fever, wounds, and digestive issues.
